title: Zoom Mod
description: A small utility mod focused on improving overall gameplay convenience.
body:
The **Simple Zoom Mod** is a lightweight and user-friendly modification designed to enhance 
your gameplay experience by adding a clean, responsive, and highly practical zoom feature. 
While many mods aim to overhaul large parts of the game, this one focuses on doing one thing 
and doing it well: giving players the ability to zoom smoothly and efficiently whenever they 
need a closer look at their surroundings.

Whether you are exploring distant structures, scouting terrain, spotting mobs, or simply 
enjoying the visual details of the world, this mod provides a comfortable and unobtrusive 
way to zoom in without breaking immersion. It is intentionally minimalistic, keeping the 
gameplay as close to vanilla as possible while still offering better clarity and improved 
control over your view.

The mod includes a dedicated keybind for quick access, making zooming fast, intuitive, 
and natural during gameplay. It does not introduce unnecessary menus, settings, or complex 
mechanics — everything works right out of the box. Because of its simplicity, the mod is 
perfect for players who want extra convenience without adding heavy or intrusive features 
to their game.

Overall, the **Simple Zoom Mod** is a clean, efficient, and practical quality-of-life 
addition suitable for any player looking for a better viewing experience.
